revision.text:
[[Category:Categories created from enwiki title]] [[Category:Tier 3 Categories]][[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[ja:Category:合気道]] [[ar:Category:آيكيدو]] [[ary:Category:آيكيدو]] [[az:Category:Aykido]] [[bg:Category:Айкидо]] [[bn:Category:আইকিদো]] [[bo:Category:ཨའི་ཁི་དོ།]] [[ca:Category:Aikido]] [[ckb:Category:ئایکیدۆ]] [[commons:Category:Aikido]] [[cs:Category:Aikido]] [[da:Category:Aikido]] [[de:Category:Aikidō]] [[eo:Category:Ajkido]] [[es:Category:Aikidō]] [[fa:Category:آیکیدو]] [[fi:Category:Aikido]] [[fr:Category:Aïkido]] [[fy:Category:Aikido]] [[gl:Category:Aikido]] [[he:Category:אייקידו]] [[hr:Category:Aikido]] [[is:Category:Aikido]] [[it:Category:Aikido]] [[ka:Category:აიკიდო]] [[ko:Category:아이키도]] [[lb:Category:Aikido]] [[mk:Category:Аикидо]] [[mn:Category:Айкидо]] [[ms:Category:Aikido]] [[nl:Category:Aikido]] [[no:Category:Aikido]] [[pl:Category:Aikido]] [[pt:Category:Aiquidô]] [[ro:Category:Aikido]] [[ru:Category:Айкидо]] [[sh:Category:Aikido]] [[sk:Category:Aikido]] [[sl:Category:Ajkido]] [[sr:Category:Аикидо]] [[sv:Category:Aikido]] [[th:Category:ไอกิโด]] [[tr:Category:Aikido]] [[uk:Category:Айкідо]] [[vi:Category:Aikido]] [[zh_yue:Category:合氣道]] [[zh:Category:合气道]]
This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[Aiki Shrine]].

revision.comment: Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q8854880)
Bot: ensure Tier-2 tag (existing redirect target)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories created from enwiki title]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
